title: KHAWZAWL DISTRICT RGSA HNUAIAH VC PATHUM TAN COMPUTER SET SEM A NI
content:
1149/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, June 24, 2026:Vawiin khan DRDO Conference Hall, Khawzawl-ah Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) hnuaiah Khawzawl District chhunga Village Council (VC) pathum—Khawzawl Darngawn, Khualen, leh Tlangpui ten ṭangkai taka an hman turin Computer set sem chhuah a ni a. He Computer set semna hun hi Pu K. Lalhmuakliana, District Local Administration Officer (DLAO), Khawzawl chuan a kaihruai a. Pu K. Zorammuana, Additional Deputy Commissioner (Addl. DC), Khawzawl chuan khuallian niin he programme hi a hmanpui.Khuallian Pu K. Zorammuana chuan thu sawiin, tunlai khawvelah khawtlang hmasawnna tura sawrkar hmalakna lawmawm a tih thu leh ṭha taka hnathawh a nih theihnan technology a pawimawh hle tih a sawi a. VC-te'n VC tharte nen charge inhlan chungchangah VC bungraw neih ang angte kim taka inhlan chhawng zel ṭhin turin a fuih a. Vawiina Computer set sem takte chu VC-ten khawtlang enkawlna leh mipui rawngbawlna kawngah ṭangkai taka hmang ngei turin a chah bawk a ni.He hunah hian Computer dawngtu VC aiawhte leh official pawimawh dangte an tel a, VC aiawh te pawhin lawmthu sawiin he Computer Set thar hian VC Office hnathawh a tihchak ngei an beisei thu an tarlang a ni.

title: Mizoram PHED Officer-te tan ni hnih awh Capacity Building Program buatsaih a ni
content:
1148/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th June 2026:Vawiin chawhma khan PHED Officer-te tan ni hnih awh tur Capacity Building Program chu Conference Hall, PHED E-in-C Office, Khatlaah a khuh hawnna neih a ni a. Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Guwahati Branch Office leh Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs (FCS&CA) Department te buatsaih a ni.

Capacity Building Program hi Mizoram PHED hnuaia Senior Executive Engineer leh a chunglam te tana ruahman niin, he program-ah hian mi 20 vel an tel thei a. Thupui (topics) pawimawh thlan bik 12 atangin BIS lama mithiam pahnih – Dr. Anuj Verma (Assistant Professor, RIMT) leh Dr. Murali Mohan (Senior Environmental Scientist, TSPC) ten PowerPoint presentation hmangin zirtirna an pe dawn a ni.

He hun hi Chief Secretary Chairman-na hnuaia Committee pawimawh tak pakhat – ‘State Level Standardisation Committee’ meeting hnuhnung ber a committee thuchhuak bawhzuina kal zel a ni a. BIS Guwahati mi leh sa te chuan hetiang ang Capacity Building Program hi Mizoram Sawrkar Department thlanchhuah bik te hnenah a tahtawla neih zel tum a nih thu sawiin, June 22, 2026 khan PWD Officer-te tan Capacity Building Program hi an lo buatsaih tawh bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: PMMVY A INZIAH LUH HUN HAWN MEK A NI
content:
1147/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th June, 2026:Directorate of Women & Child Development chuan nu naupai te tana hamthatna dawn theihna scheme Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY) a inziah luhna hun chu June 15 atanga July 15, 2026 thleng a hawng mek a. Nu naupai lai zawng zawng te chu Anganwadi Centre hnai ber a lo inziak lut ve theuh turin an sawm a ni.

PMMVY Scheme hnuaiah hian fa hmasa ber atan nu in Rs 5000 dawn theih niin, fa pahnihna hmeichhia nei te tan Rs 6000 nu hnenah Direct Benefit Transfer hmangin an bank account ah thunsak thin an ni.

PMMVY hnuai a hamthatna dawng tur hian nu te adhaar card leh passbook a ngai a, heng documents pahnih ah hian nu hming hi a inang tur a ni a, an adhaar card hi an phone number leh an passbook nen a in link ngei bawk tur a ni.

He scheme hnuaiah hian Directorate of Women and Child Development hian Kum 2025 – 2026 chhung in mi 5841 hnenah hamthatna hi an lo pe tawh a, a pawisa fai chuan ₹ 2,79,68,000 pek chhuah tawh a ni.

title: MBSE leh NCERT tangkawpin Training buatsaih
content:
1146/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 23rdJune, 2026 :Mizoram Board of School Education (MBSE) leh Performance Assessment, Review, and Analysis of Knowledge for Holistic Development (PARAKH), NCERT, New Delhi te hmalaknain June ni 22 leh 23, 2026 khan MBSE Office, Chaltlangah ni hnih awh tur Master Trainers’ Training on Holistic Progress Card (HPC) at Secondary Stage chu hlawhtling taka  neih  a ni.

He training programme hawnna hi HPC Nodal Officer, Pu F. Ricky Lalremruatpuia, Academic Officer in a kaihruai a. MBSE Secretary, Pi Sarah Lalengzami Pachuau-in kal khawmte lawmna thu sawiin, programme chanchin tlangpui a sawifiah a. He training-ah hian Resource Person atan PARAKH, NCERT atanga lo kal hman a ni a, a hnen atang hian PARAKH hmalakna hrang hrang leh he training pawimawhna te ngaihthlak a ni.

Programme hawnnaah hian Prof. Indrani Bhaduri, PARAKH NCERT CEO leh Head ni bawk hnen atangin thuchah ngaihthlak a ni a. Mizoramah HPC hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan Board te chu fuihna leh duhsakna a hlan.

A hawnna programme zawhah hian Resource Person kaihhruaina hnuaiah technical training session chhunzawm nghal a ni a. HPC secondary stage-a hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte inzirtirna leh practical training te neih a ni. He training-ah hian MBSE Officer-te, District Institute of Education and Training (DIETs) leh Institute of Advanced Studies in Education (IASE)-a zirtirtute chu Master Trainer ni turin training pek an ni.

He training programme hi MBSE in tun academic session a HPC pilot implement na atana inbuatsaihna a ni a, MBSE chuan an Affiliated sikul sawm (10)-ah HPC hi enchhinna (pilot implementation) nei turin inbuatsaihna a kalpui mek a ni.

Attachment

title: RUIHHLO DO KAWNGZAWH (WALKATHON) SERCHHIPAH NEIH A NI
content:
Dated Serchhip, the 24thJune 2026:Nasha Mukt Bharat Saptah (Drug-Free Week) hman mek pualin vawiin khan ruihhlo do kawngzawh (Walkathon) Serchhipah neih a ni.

Serchhip District NMBA Committee huaihawt kawngzawh hi Serchhip YMA Sub-Headquarters Vice President Pu Lalrammuana'n a kaihruai a. Serchhip Block Development Officer (BDO) Dr. Lalramdintluanga'n thu sawiin, ruihhlo chungchang leh thalaite fuihna thu a sawi.

Kawngzawh hi Serchhip Bazar Kawn atanga tanin, Leisekawt Field thleng zawh a ni a. He hunah hian Serchhip thalai rualte, khawtlang hruaitute leh Sawrkar Department hrang hranga thawkte an tel a ni.

Attachment
